ddls:
CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who requested the quote */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car for which the quote is generated */,
  "before_jerry" TEXT /* Insurance rate before applying Jerry's discount */,
  "after_jerry" TEXT /* Insurance rate after applying Jerry's discount */,
  "quote_date" TEXT /* Date when the quote was generated */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance agent who provided the quote */,
  "quote_status" TEXT /* Status of the quote (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the quote was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the quote was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer's residence */,
  "insurance_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_insurance_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_company_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("insurance_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the car */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the car was manufactured */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) of the car */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_companies" (
  "insurance_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the insurance company */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the insurance company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance agent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the insurance agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the insurance agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the insurance agent */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region assigned to the insurance agent */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the agent was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the agent was terminated (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the policy */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car insured by the policy */,
  "insurance_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance company that issued the policy */,
  "policy_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "policy_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "premium" TEXT /* Premium amount for the policy */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, inactive, cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the policy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_insurance_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_company_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("insurance_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy under which the claim is made */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was filed */,
  "claim_amount" TEXT /* Amount claimed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy for which the payment is made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, check) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle history report */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the vehicle history report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the vehicle history report (e.g., clean, accident reported) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit score was reported */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of credit score (e.g., FICO, VantageScore) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts_offered" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount offered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "discount_name" TEXT /* Name of the discount */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_offered_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts_applied" (
  "applied_discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount applied */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discount */,
  "applied_date" TEXT /* Date when the discount was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applied_discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_applied_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_applied_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts_offered ("discount_id")
)
